steps.description: Select option 1 (Maintain Customers) from the LEGADEMO main menu
Submit the menu selection to navigate to the Maintain Customers screen
Open the customer selection prompt list to browse available customers
Scroll forward through the customer list to view additional entries
Close the customer selection list and return to the Customer Number entry screen
Type the customer number to look up
Submit the customer number to display the customer record
Exit the customer details screen and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
